hero.description: The all-in-one command center for campus administration. Orchestrate exams, hackathons, and workshops through an intuitive, institutional-grade platform.

about.imageAlt: Students collaborating in a modern university space
about.title: Our Institutional Mission
about.descriptionOne: DESS was engineered by university infrastructure experts to bridge the gap between traditional scheduling hurdles and modern digital efficiency. We provide a robust architecture that handles the complexities of higher education logistical needs.
about.descriptionTwo: From automated conflict resolution for large-scale exams to tiered approval workflows for student-led hackathons, our system ensures that every event on campus is executed flawlessly.

features.title: Engineered for Academic Excellence
features.description: A suite of professional tools designed to manage every facet of campus event planning with pixel-perfect precision.

exam.title: Exam Scheduling Matrix
exam.description: Advanced conflict resolution engine that automatically assigns rooms and invigilators, ensuring no student has overlapping sessions.

hackathon.title: Hackathon Hub
hackathon.description: Dedicated pipeline for technical events, including registration management and mentor matching.

approvals.title: Admin Approvals
approvals.description: Multi-tier workflow for facility management, security, and departmental approval chains.

seminars.title: Seminars & Workshops
seminars.description: Interactive scheduling for guest lectures and technical workshops with QR-based attendance tracking.

createEvent.question: How do I create a new event?
createEvent.answer: Navigate to your Command Center dashboard and click the Create New Event button in the sidebar. Follow the guided wizard to set your date, venue, and attendance requirements.

approvals.question: Who can approve events?
approvals.answer: Approvals follow a hierarchical chain. Department Heads approve initial requests, while Facility Managers confirm venue availability. High-profile events may require approval from the Dean's office.

attendance.question: Is there a limit on student attendance?
attendance.answer: Attendance limits are automatically synchronized with the maximum capacity of the selected venue. Once capacity is reached, the system opens a waitlist.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in implementing DESS at your institution? Our technical deployment team is ready to assist.
